# AI Open Standards

> Draft standards site for machine-readable documentation and specification design.

Base machine entry point: /README.llm
Machine manifest: /.well-known/llm-index.json
Machine docs index: /machine-docs/

## Published drafts

- [OSSS Proposal](/osss/): Open Specification Structure Standard draft.
- [README.llm vNext](/readme-llm-vnext/): Retrieval-aware, multi-file, and behavioural extensions proposal.
- [AXON](/axon/): Agentic Context Orchestration Nexus proposal.
- [CLOAKD](/cloakd/): Credential handling standard for agentic development environments.

## Machine-facing docs

- [README.llm](/README.llm): Base rules and site-level guidance for agents.
- [Manifest](/.well-known/llm-index.json): Discovery manifest for targeted retrieval.
- [Overview](/llm/overview.md): Site scope and content boundaries.
- [Route Reference](/llm/routes.md): Canonical routes and behavioural notes.
- [Retrieval Recipes](/llm/retrieval-recipes.md): Minimal-context task patterns.
